scene.speaker: The Lord Marshall
scene.line: I used history. You were merely its finest instrument.

scene.speaker: The Lord Marshall
scene.line: And because he did, he never wavered. Loyalty is the purest key.

scene.speaker: Sera
scene.line: You dressed evil as duty. There is no grace left in you.

scene.speaker: Kain
scene.line: I told you kings lie. I just hoped this one did not.

scene.speaker: Mirel
scene.line: So much death for one man's design.
